passive.name: Salvation
passive.description: Soraka runs faster towards nearby low health allies.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Soraka}} gains tremendous {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while facing nearby allied {{tip|champions}} that are {{as|at low health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Soraka''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|90% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while facing nearby allied {{tip|champions}} that are {{as|below 40% of their '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.notes: * '''Soraka''' will see an arrow indicating the direction in which she can gain the bonus movement speed.

Q.name: Starcall
Q.description: A star falls from the sky at the target location dealing magic damage and slowing enemies. If an enemy champion is hit by Starcall, Soraka recovers Health.
Q.tooltip:
Soraka calls down a star, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage and Slowing by {{ movespeedslow*100 }}% for {{ slowduration }} seconds. 

Hitting an enemy champion grants Soraka Rejuvenation, which restores {{ totalhot }} Health over {{ hotduration }} seconds and grants {{ movespeedhaste*100 }}% Move Speed decaying over the same duration.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Soraka}} calls down a star upon the target location that deals {{as|magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|slows}} enemies hit. If this hits at least one enemy {{tip|champion}}, the star dust returns to '''Soraka''' to grant her ''Rejuvenation'' for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: While '''Soraka''' has ''Rejuvenation'', ''{{ai|Astral Infusion|Soraka}}'' will also grant ''Rejuvenation'' to the target ally.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Rejuvenation}}: The target continually {{tip|heals}} over time and gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} that decays over the duration.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Soraka''' calls down a star upon the target location that grants {{tip|sight}} of the area before landing after {{pp|type=target range|0.25 to 1 for 16|50 to 800}} seconds, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 30% for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: If this hits at least one enemy {{tip|champion}}, the star dust returns to '''Soraka''' to grant her ''Rejuvenation'' for {{fd|2.5}} seconds. While '''Soraka''' has ''Rejuvenation'', ''{{ai|Astral Infusion|Soraka}}'' will also grant the effects of ''Rejuvenation'' to the target ally for the same duration.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Rejuvenation}}: The target {{tip|heals}} every {{fd|0.5}} seconds and gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} that decays over the duration.
wiki_detail.leveling3:
{{st|Total Heal|{{ap|60 to 120}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}}|Heal per Tick|{{ap|60/5 to 120/5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|30/5}}% AP)}}}}
{{st|Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|20 to 30}}%}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Starcall'' counts as hitting even if it gets blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}, granting ''Rejuvenation''.
* {{cai|Wind Wall|Yasuo}} and {{cai|Unbreakable|Braum}} can block the ''Rejuvenation'' projectile.
* ''Rejuvenation'' heals over 12 ticks, with the first 4 each healing for about 15% of the heal, the next 4 ticks for about {{fd|5.5}}% each, and the last 4 for about {{fd|4.5}}% each.
* ''Rejuvenation'' won't be granted to '''Soraka''' and she won't be able to make use of the health cost reduction on {{ai|Astral Infusion|Soraka}} until the projectile gets to her, but she is able to ''Rejuvenate'' allies as soon as the target is hit.

W.name: Astral Infusion
W.description: Soraka sacrifices a portion of her own health to heal another friendly champion.
W.tooltip:
Soraka restores {{ totalheal }} Health to another allied champion.

If Soraka is affected by Rejuvenation, the Health cost will be reduced by {{ percenthealthcostrefund*100 }}%, and the target will gain Rejuvenation for {{ spell.sorakaq:hotduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Soraka}} consumes a portion of {{as|her '''maximum''' health}} to {{tip|heal}} the target allied champion.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If this is cast while under ''{{ai|Starcall|Soraka|Rejuvenation}}'', the {{as|health cost}} is reduced.
wiki_detail.description2: If cast while under ''{{ai|Starcall|Soraka|Rejuvenation}}'', the {{as|health cost}} will be reduced by a percentage.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Health Cost Reduction|{{ap|80 to 100}}%|Reduced Health Cost|{{as|{{ap|2 to 0}}% of '''maximum''' health}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''Astral Infusion'' cannot be cast if '''Soraka''' is {{as|{{sti|health|below 5% of her '''maximum''' health}}}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Astral Infusion'' can also be targeted on allied {{tip|clone|decoys}}.
* ''Astral Infusion'' can be cast even if '''Soraka''' doesn't have the sufficient amount of health to pay for the health cost while above {{as|{{sti|health|5% of her '''maximum''' health}}}}.
** As with all abilities with health costs, ''Astral Infusion'' will not reduce '''Soraka's''' health below {{as|1|hp}}.
* {{ii|Spirit Visage}} will only increase the health donated to allies if the target ally possesses it, although owning it ''will'' boost the heal that '''Soraka''' receives from {{ai|Starcall|Soraka}} and {{ai|Wish|Soraka}}.
* ''Astral Infusion's'' effects occur before the cast time.

E.name: Equinox
E.description: Creates a zone at a location that silences all enemies inside. When the zone expires, all enemies still inside are rooted.
E.tooltip: Soraka creates a starfield that deals {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to champions. The field lingers for {{ rootdelay }} seconds, Silencing enemies inside. When the zone disappears, champions inside the zone are Rooted for {{ rootduration }} second(s) and take {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Soraka}} creates a celestial zone at the target location that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemy champions within upon casting. The zone then persists for a brief moment and {{tip|silence|siliences}} enemies within.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Afterwards, the zone erupts to deal {{as|magic damage}} to enemy champions within and briefly {{tip|root}} them.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Soraka''' creates a celestial zone at the target location that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemy champions within at the time of cast. The zone then persists for {{fd|1.5}} seconds and {{tip|silence|silences}} enemies within.
wiki_detail.description2: Afterwards, the zone erupts to deal the same damage to enemy champions within and {{tip|root}} them for a duration.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|70*2 to 170*2}} {{as|(+ 80% AP)}}}}
{{st|Root Duration|{{ap|1 to 2}} seconds}}
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|260|Silence field which appears to affect in a very slightly larger radius than the damage and root radius checks cover}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Equinox's'' {{tip|silence}} is marked as non-dispellable, so it is not removed by most {{tip|cleanse|cleanses}}. It is however allowed to be removed by cleanses that '''also''' grant immunity to it, such as {{cai|Ragnarok|Olaf}}.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will not block the {{tip|silence}}.

R.name: Wish
R.description: Soraka fills her allies with hope, instantly restoring health to herself and all allied champions.
R.tooltip: Soraka calls upon divine powers, restoring {{ healingcalc }} Health to all allied champions, regardless of distance. Healing is increased to {{ ampedhealing }} on targets below 40% Health.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Soraka}} calls upon the stars, {{tip|heal|healing}} herself and her allies. The healing is increased on targets {{as|at low health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Soraka''' calls upon the stars, {{tip|heal|healing}} herself and all allied champions, increased by 50% on targets {{as|below 40% of their '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* Due to several character stats needing to be recalculated each time a character spawns, casting ''Wish'' immediately upon respawning will cause its cooldown to be unaffected by ability haste, and the healing will not be increased by '''Soraka's''' {{as|ability power}}. {{bug}}
* {{tip|Untargetable|Untargetability}} does not invalidate the targeting of the heal.
* ''Wish'' will not credit '''Soraka''' for [[assist]]ing in a [[kill|champion kill]] if the target ally is at full health.
* ''Wish'' will apply heal effects (such as {{ri|Summon Aery}}) prioritizing targets based on the ''Spawn ID'', which is the order in which units were added to an ongoing game. For {{tip|champions}}, this is the order they appear in from left to right in the loading screen.
* ''Wish's'' effects occur before the cast time.
